page.title: Canados 86 vs Maiora 26m: Marbella Superyacht Compared

data.meta_description: Canados 86 vs Maiora 26m in Marbella: compare length, capacity, amenities, and price. Find your ideal superyacht charter in Puerto Banús.
data.summary: A detailed comparison of the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m superyachts available for charter in Marbella, covering specs, capacity, amenities, and booking tips.
key_facts: Both offer licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT
Pricing for both is on request via WhatsApp
Canados 86 features a flybridge and spacious saloon
Maiora 26m is known for its sleek Italian design and open deck layout

faq.q: Which is bigger, Canados 86 or Maiora 26m?
faq.a: Both are 26 metres in length, so identical in size. The Canados 86 measures 26m, and the Maiora 26m is also 26m. Both accommodate up to 12 guests, making them a perfect match for large groups wanting a superyacht experience in Marbella.

faq.q: How many guests can the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m hold?
faq.a: Both yachts carry a maximum of 12 passengers. The Canados 86 has a spacious flybridge and interior saloon, while the Maiora 26m offers an open deck layout with ample sunbathing space. Ideal for parties, corporate events, or family outings.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price for these superyachts?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Pricing for both yachts is on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Where do the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m depart from?
faq.a: Both yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic superyacht marina. This gives you direct access to the Costa del Sol's best cruising spots, including Cabopino, Estepona, and the beaches of the Golden Mile.

faq.q: What is the difference in design between the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m?
faq.a: The Canados 86 is a classic flybridge motor yacht with a traditional interior and large outdoor spaces. The Maiora 26m, built by the Italian Maiora yard, features a more modern, open layout with a sleek profile and extensive sun pads. Both are luxurious but cater to different tastes.

faq.q: Can I bring my own food and drinks on board?
faq.a: Our charters include a selection of drinks and light snacks as standard. You are welcome to bring additional food or special beverages; just let us know in advance so the skipper can accommodate. The galley on both yachts is equipped for chilling and serving.

faq.q: How do I book the Canados 86 or Maiora 26m?
faq.a: Pricing is on request. Simply contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a tailored quote within hours. Both yachts are popular, so early booking is recommended.

faq.q: Which yacht is better for a party: Canados 86 or Maiora 26m?
faq.a: Both excel for parties. The Canados 86 has a large flybridge ideal for dancing and socialising, while the Maiora 26m offers a more open main deck with plenty of seating. For a livelier vibe, the Maiora's layout encourages mingling; for a more classic party, the Canados is superb.

data.body_html:
Choosing between the Canados 86 and the Maiora 26m for your Marbella superyacht charter? Both are 26-metre vessels departing from Puerto Banús, each accommodating up to 12 guests. But their personalities differ. This side-by-side comparison covers specs, amenities, and what to expect from each, so you can pick the one that fits your style. For a full overview of our fleet, visit our [main charter page](/).

Specs at a Glance

FeatureCanados 86Maiora 26m
Length26m26m
Max Guests1212
DeparturePuerto BanúsPuerto Banús
PricingOn request (WhatsApp)On request (WhatsApp)
InclusionsSkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, VATSkipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, VAT

Design & Layout

The Canados 86 is a classic flybridge motor yacht. Its raised helm station offers panoramic views, while the main deck features a spacious saloon with a dining area and a galley. The flybridge is perfect for sunbathing or al fresco dining. The Maiora 26m, built by the Italian Maiora yard, adopts a more contemporary approach. Its open main deck blends indoor and outdoor living, with large windows and a forward sun pad. The stern platform is generous for swimming and water access.

Onboard Experience

Both yachts come with a licensed skipper and a crew member to ensure a seamless day. The Canados 86 feels more enclosed, with separate zones for lounging and dining. The Maiora 26m encourages a social flow, with guests moving freely from the aft cockpit to the saloon and foredeck. For a relaxed family cruise, the Canados offers privacy. For a lively party, the Maiora's open plan is hard to beat. Both include drinks (beer, wine, cava, soft drinks) and light snacks.

Destinations from Puerto Banús

Departing from Puerto Banús, you can head west to Estepona or east to Cabopino. The Canados 86, with its flybridge, is ideal for longer cruises to Sotogrande (about 25 NM). The Maiora 26m, with its sporty profile, excels for a day trip to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés. Both can anchor off the Golden Mile for swimming and lunch with a view of La Concha mountain.

Pricing & Booking

Unlike our Tier A boats (e.g., Astondoa 40 at €749/2h), pricing for the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m is on request. This reflects the bespoke nature of superyacht charters. To get a quote, simply WhatsApp us with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. Both yachts are in high demand, especially during summer. Early booking secures your slot. For more details on our other superyachts, check our [fleet page](/).

Which One Should You Choose?

  • Choose the Canados 86 if you want a traditional flybridge layout with separate social zones and a classic motor yacht feel.
  • Choose the Maiora 26m if you prefer a modern, open design that encourages mingling and has a sleek Italian aesthetic.
  • Both are identical in size and capacity, so your decision hinges on style and the kind of day you envision.

Frequently asked questions

Which is bigger, Canados 86 or Maiora 26m?

Both are 26 metres in length, so identical in size. The Canados 86 measures 26m, and the Maiora 26m is also 26m. Both accommodate up to 12 guests, making them a perfect match for large groups wanting a superyacht experience in Marbella.

How many guests can the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m hold?

Both yachts carry a maximum of 12 passengers. The Canados 86 has a spacious flybridge and interior saloon, while the Maiora 26m offers an open deck layout with ample sunbathing space. Ideal for parties, corporate events, or family outings.

What is included in the charter price for these superyachts?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). Pricing for both yachts is on request via WhatsApp.

Where do the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m depart from?

Both yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella's iconic superyacht marina. This gives you direct access to the Costa del Sol's best cruising spots, including Cabopino, Estepona, and the beaches of the Golden Mile.

What is the difference in design between the Canados 86 and Maiora 26m?

The Canados 86 is a classic flybridge motor yacht with a traditional interior and large outdoor spaces. The Maiora 26m, built by the Italian Maiora yard, features a more modern, open layout with a sleek profile and extensive sun pads. Both are luxurious but cater to different tastes.

Can I bring my own food and drinks on board?

Our charters include a selection of drinks and light snacks as standard. You are welcome to bring additional food or special beverages; just let us know in advance so the skipper can accommodate. The galley on both yachts is equipped for chilling and serving.

How do I book the Canados 86 or Maiora 26m?

Pricing is on request. Simply contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a tailored quote within hours. Both yachts are popular, so early booking is recommended.

Which yacht is better for a party: Canados 86 or Maiora 26m?

Both excel for parties. The Canados 86 has a large flybridge ideal for dancing and socialising, while the Maiora 26m offers a more open main deck with plenty of seating. For a livelier vibe, the Maiora's layout encourages mingling; for a more classic party, the Canados is superb.
